Class Documentation

class ConstraintPattern

Subclassed by cardillo::physics::BeamConstraint, cardillo::physics::LinearDistanceConstraint, cardillo::physics::TranslationRotationConstraint

Public Functions

ConstraintPattern(entt::registry &reg, entt::entity a, entt::entity b, index_t numRows)
virtual ~ConstraintPattern() = default
inline entt::entity entityA() const
inline entt::entity entityB() const
virtual ConstraintResult getConstraint() const = 0
inline virtual VectorXr getSource() const
inline virtual void setScalarVelocity(real_t v)
inline virtual void setLinearVelocity(const Vector3r &v)
inline virtual void setAngularVelocity(const Vector3r &w)
bool getAttachPointsWorld(Vector3r &xA, Vector3r &xB) const

Protected Functions

WorldAttachments computeAttachments_() const
